title: Air-Fried Crispy Saudia Wholegrain Bread
description: A rich, tender, and adventurous dish featuring wholegrain bread that is perfect for a quick breakfast or snack.

ingredients.name: Wholegrain Bread
ingredients.notes: Ensure the bread is halal and unsliced for easier air-frying.

instructions: Slice the wholegrain bread into thin rounds.
Lightly brush each slice with olive oil and sprinkle lightly with salt on both sides.
Place the bread slices in the preheated air fryer basket, making sure not to overcrowd them.
Air fry for 2-3 minutes per side or until golden brown and crispy.
Remove from the air fryer and serve immediately.
